title: Internal Request Queue
description: Build an internal request queue for IT/HR/Facilities/Finance tickets. Employees submit a request (title, description, category, priority, submitter). Ops staff can update requests (requires login) — change status, assign to a team, add resolution notes. Need: POST /api/requests (public), GET /api/requests (list), GET /api/requests/new (filter by status='new'), PUT /api/requests/:id (auth required).
skeleton:
build for web and javascript backend

create a Requests table:
  title, required
  description
  category, default 'IT'
  priority, default 'Normal'
  submitter, required
  status, default 'new'
  assigned_to

allow signup and login

# Your endpoints + employee submit page + ops triage view here
